code:
from typing import List
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: List[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an artist (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent English sentence. Handles a variety of predicates and joins multiple
    facts with commas and a final conjunction.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Identify the main subject (most common subject in triples)
    subject_counts = {}
    for t in triples:
        subject_counts[t.subject] = subject_counts.get(t.subject, 0) + 1
    main_subject = max(subject_counts, key=subject_counts.get)

    # Map predicates to natural language templates
    predicate_map = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "deathDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} died on {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "origin": lambda s, o: f"{s} originates from {o}",
        "nationality": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o}",
        "genre": lambda s, o: f"{s} performs {o}",
        "instrument": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays the {o}",
        "occupation": lambda s, o: f"{s} works as a {o}",
        "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist": lambda s, o: f"{s} is associated with {o}",
        "recordLabel": lambda s, o: f"{s} is signed to {o}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} started their career in {o}",
        "activeYearsEndYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} ended their career in {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s capital is {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s language is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s official language is {o}",
        "parentCompany": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "bandMember": lambda s, o: f"{s} includes member {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s leader is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s leader title is {o}",
        "alternativeName": lambda s, o: f"{s}, also known as {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{s} is of {o} descent",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"{s} people are known as {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s currency is {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s anthem is {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "distributingCompany": lambda s, o: f"{s} is distributed by {o}",
        "training": lambda s, o: f"{s} was trained at {o}",
        "professionalField": lambda s, o: f"{s} works in {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {o}",
        "location": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "background": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a {o}",
        "musicFusionGenre": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a fusion of {o}",
        "musicSubgenre": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a subgenre of {o}",
        "stylisticOrigin": lambda s, o: f"{s} has origins in {o}",
        "derivative": lambda s, o: f"{s} influenced {o}",
        "meaning": lambda s, o: f"{s} means {o}",
        "longName": lambda s, o: f"{s}, officially {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s total area is {o}",
    }

    # Generate fragments for each triple
    fragments = []
    for t in triples:
        s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
        if p in predicate_map:
            fragment = predicate_map[p](s, o)
        else:
            fragment = f"{s} {p} {o}"
        fragments.append(fragment)

    # Build final sentence with proper structure
    if len(fragments) == 0:
        return ""
    elif len(fragments) == 1:
        return fragments[0] + "."
    else:
        return ", ".join(fragments[:-1]) + ", and " + fragments[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
